  live-html:
    embed-resources: true

resources:

webr:
  render-df: gt-interactive
  packages:
    - dplyr
    - ggplot2
  resources:
    - donnees/grandile.rds
---


::: {.cell}

:::





## Description des données

**Grandile** comporte 5418 individus, caractérisés par 12 variables.

### Les variables

::: {.cell}
```{webr}
grandile <- readRDS('donnees/grandile.rds') 
colnames(grandile)
```
:::


### Indicateurs statistiques

::: {.cell}
```{webr}
summary(grandile)
```
:::


## Distribution des revenus selon la PCS


::: {.cell}
```{webr}
#| label: rev_pcs
graph_revenusPCS <- grandile %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = pcs, y = REVENU, fill = pcs)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "grey20", size = 0.5)
graph_revenusPCS
```
:::


## Modèle linéaire

::: {.cell}
```{webr}
fit = lm(REVENU ~ PATRIMOINE, data = grandile)
summary(fit)
plot(fit)
```
:::


## Extrait de table

::: {#tbl-grandile .cell tbl-cap='Revenus à Grandile'}
```{webr}
#| label: tbl-grandile
#| tbl-cap: Revenus à Grandile
tab <- grandile %>% 
  select(IDENT, MODCOHA, pcs, REVENU)
tab
```
:::
